summary: Tested filter functionality for 'Available Orders' in Trend Syria driver app. Bug fix verified - 'منتجات' (Products) filter now correctly shows only product orders and NOT food orders. All three filters (الكل, منتجات, طعام) are working as expected.

minor.issue: Intermittent 'فشل في تحديث حالة التوفر' error when toggling driver availability

critical_code_review_comments: AvailableOrdersList.js (lines 43-53): Filter logic correctly implemented - shopOrders filters out food orders using order_source !== 'food'
DeliveryPages.js (lines 1196-1205): Correctly passes empty arrays based on filter selection - orderTypeFilter === 'food' ? [] : availableOrders for products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter bug is fixed. Driver login -> dismiss notification prompt -> filters work correctly. Currently 4 available orders (2 food, 0 products). Driver availability toggle may show intermittent errors but doesn't affect filter functionality.

filter_all.behavior: Shows both food and product orders (if available)

filter_products.behavior: Shows only product orders, NOT food orders
filter_products.note: Correctly hides food orders when filtering for products

filter_food.behavior: Shows only food orders, NOT product orders
filter_food.note: Shows 2 food orders from مطعم البيت الدمشقي

bug_verification.original_issue: فلتر 'المنتجات' يعرض طلبات طعام بدلاً من طلبات المنتجات فقط
bug_verification.fix_description: Filter logic now correctly separates food orders (foodOrders prop) from product orders (orders prop filtered by order_source !== 'food')
